ADROIT.title: Adroit
CLONE.description: This card can be duplicated at [gold]Rest Sites[/gold].
CLONE.title: Clone
CORRUPTED.description: Deal [blue]50%[/blue] more damage, but lose [blue]2[/blue] HP.
CORRUPTED.title: Corrupted
DEPRECATED_ENCHANTMENT.description: This enchantment has been removed from the game.
DEPRECATED_ENCHANTMENT.title: Deprecated
FAVORED.description: This card's attack damage is doubled.
FAVORED.title: Favored
GLAM.description: This card has [gold]Replay[/gold] once per combat.
GLAM.title: Glam
GOOPY.description: This card gains [gold]Exhaust[/gold]. When played, permanently increase this card's [gold]Block[/gold] by [blue]1[/blue].
GOOPY.title: Goopy
IMBUED.description: This card is played automatically at the start of each combat.
IMBUED.title: Imbued
INSTINCT.description: Decrease the cost of this card by [blue]1[/blue].
INSTINCT.title: Instinct
MOCK_FREE_ENCHANTMENT.title: Mock Free Enchantment
MOMENTUM.description: Increase this card's attack damage by [blue]{Amount}[/blue] this combat when played.
MOMENTUM.extraCardText: Increase this card's damage by {Amount} this combat.
MOMENTUM.title: Momentum
NIMBLE.description: Increases [gold]Block[/gold] gained from this card by [blue]{Amount}[/blue].
NIMBLE.title: Nimble
PERFECT_FIT.description: Whenever this would be shuffled into your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold], place it on the top instead.
PERFECT_FIT.title: Perfect Fit
ROYALLY_APPROVED.title: Royally Approved
SHARP.description: Increases damage on this card by [blue]{Amount}[/blue].
SHARP.title: Sharp
SLITHER.description: When you draw this card, randomize its cost from [blue]0[/blue] to [blue]3[/blue].
SLITHER.title: Slither
SLUMBERING_ESSENCE.description: If this card is in your hand at the end of turn, reduce its cost by [blue]1[/blue] until it is played.
SLUMBERING_ESSENCE.title: Slumbering Essence
SOULS_POWER.title: Soul's Power
SOWN.description: The first time you play this card each combat, gain {Amount:energyIcons()}.
SOWN.title: Sown
SPIRAL.title: Spiral
STEADY.title: Steady
SWIFT.description: The first time you play this card, draw [blue]{Amount}[/blue] {Amount:plural:card|cards}.
SWIFT.extraCardText: Draw {Amount} {Amount:plural:card|cards} the first time this is played.
SWIFT.title: Swift
TEZCATARAS_EMBER.title: Tezcatara's Ember
VIGOROUS.description: The first time this card is played, it deals [blue]{Amount}[/blue] additional damage.
VIGOROUS.title: Vigorous
